notes: Machine-readable index of every dataset in this mod. Adds coal as a new raw resource, coal briquettes as a refined fuel mirroring the uranium→enriched-uranium pattern, ash as a combustion byproduct (forward-looking hook for Stone & Concrete's cement chain), and one new Combustion Generator 2.5 m block that slots into the power curve between solar and the uranium reactor.

datasets.description: Coal — new raw resource found on planetary sedimentary/forested biomes.
Coal Briquette (refined fuel) and Ash (combustion byproduct).
Combustion Generator 2.5 m — burns coal or coal briquettes to generate electricity.
